About Professional General Works

12+ years serving Jacksonville and surrounding areas

Professional General Works started with a simple goal: to provide unmatched remodeling services to Jacksonville homeowners. We saw a need for reliable, detail-oriented contractors who understand the unique challenges of Florida homes, from humidity to hurricane preparedness.

Our approach is built on clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering commitment to quality. We value integrity, transparency, and collaboration, ensuring every project reflects your vision and our expertise.

We're proud to be part of the Jacksonville community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local businesses, and strive to contribute to the beauty and resilience of our neighborhoods.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Professional General Works

Trusted home remodeler professionals serving Jacksonville, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
